# Mapt Daily

> Mapt Daily publishes daily news and analysis across seven beats — AI & tech, finance, health, startups, crypto, world/trending and true crime — each paired with a five-minute audio brief. Summaries are AI-assisted from public news sources and refreshed twice daily.

Site: https://daily.mapt.cloud
Publisher: Mapt (https://mapt.cloud)

## Sections
- [AI & Tech](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/ai-tech/): AI Tech Daily is your free daily AI news podcast â€” 5 minutes of the biggest artificial intelligence and tech
- [Finance](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/finance/): Your free daily 5-minute finance podcast. Stock market, investing, personal finance, and economic news every m
- [Health](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/health/): Daily health and longevity news in 5 minutes. Science-backed health tips, medical breakthroughs, nutrition, fi
- [Startups](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/startup/): Daily 5-minute startup and venture capital news. Funding rounds, founder stories, product launches, and the bu
- [Crypto](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/crypto/): Your free daily 5-minute crypto and Web3 news podcast. Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, NFTs, and blockchain news ever
- [Trending](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/world-news/): The stories the whole internet is searching for, explained in 5 minutes. Every day we take Google's top trendi
- [True Crime](https://daily.mapt.cloud/blog/true-crime/): Daily true crime stories in 5 minutes. Real cases, investigations, courtroom drama, and justice served â€” eve
